TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, John Amaechi , squliq na p'unro. John Amaechi hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw, p pzyang pkaki' tay kska', pkaki' kkska'. John Amaechi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *ońßn amae ¶~ ®ńßi , s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. *ońßn amae ¶~ ®ńßi ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw, p pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē, pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. *ońßn amae ¶~ ®ńßi s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē

John Amaechi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
